title: Keel Toys SE6709 14cm Keeleco Baby Cozy Koala 100% Recycled. 100% Huggable.
features: Keel Toys SE6709 14cm Keeleco Baby Cozy Koala 100% Recycled. 100% Huggable.
description: Keel Toys are recognized worldwide by the iconic red disk in the ear of each toy, their seal of quality and value. As a first step in their new sustainability initiative, they are pleased to announce all factory shipments will now carry a new Keel toy symbone made from FSC cardboard, saving millions on the toys they sell each year. When you snuggle up into a Keeleco soft toy for the first time, the first thing you notice will be how soft the fabric is. It's pretty amazing that it started as a plastic waste and turns into a super cute and super soft toy. The children's room collection consists of Cozy Koala, Huggy Giraffe, Cuddle Zebra and Lullaby. Each is available in two sizes of toy, comforter, stick rattle and ring rattle. Cozy Koala is also available as a music version. Each toy is made from 100% recycled filling and outer fabric with embroidered eyes and features. Recycled beans give every toy that certain weight. The ring rattle features an FSC wooden ring to build on our sustainable approach to toys. The range is offered with an FSDU unit to easily display Keeleco Nursery. CDU options are available for the blankets, ring and cane rattles. How is the Keel Eco series made Stage 1: Single-use plastics and bottles have become one of the hot topics in recent years, leading to the increased use of recycled polyester. Recycled polyester, also known as rPET, is first obtained by collecting bottles and other plastic waste and cleaning. Stage 2: The cleaned bottles are then crushed. Stage 3: The crushed bottles are then crushed and formed into pellets. Stage 4: The pellets are then crushed and melted to create the yarn. Stage 5: The yarn is then spun to create the thread. The thread is then woven to create the base fabric. Children's room plush toys from the heart that don't cost the earth.
